news.t: Federated Hermes, Inc. launches four MDT quantitative active ETFs
Federated Hermes, Inc. launches Total Return Bond ETF

overview.description: The Federated Hermes Total Return Bond ETF (FTRB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is actively managed, seeking total returns from a core portfolio of US fixed-income securities with varying credit ratings and maturity. The fund selects securities through its Alpha Pod Process. FTRB was launched on Jan 2, 2024 and is issued by Federated Hermes.
